'''mayolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smallstock|smallstock]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-y-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smallstock|smallstock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mayolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæyeleth|mæyeleth]] || [[word:mæyelej|mæyelej]] || [[word:mæyelesh|mæyelesh]] || [[word:mæyele|mæyele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mayoyoloth|mayoyoloth]] || [[word:mayoyoloj|mayoyoloj]] || [[word:mayoyolosh|mayoyolosh]] || [[word:mayoyolo|mayoyolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mayoloth|mayoloth]] || [[word:mayoloj|mayoloj]] || [[word:mayolosh|mayolosh]] || [[word:mayolo|mayolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mayofloth|mayofloth]] || [[word:mayofloj|mayofloj]] || [[word:mayoflosh|mayoflosh]] || [[word:mayoflof|mayoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mayolotho|mayolotho]] || [[word:mayolojo|mayolojo]] || [[word:mayolosho|mayolosho]] || [[word:mayoloko|mayoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mayoloth|mayoloth]] || [[word:mayoloj|mayoloj]] || [[word:mayolosh|mayolosh]] || [[word:mayolo|mayolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mayolothol|mayolothol]] || [[word:mayolojol|mayolojol]] || [[word:mayoloshol|mayoloshol]] || [[word:mayolokol|mayolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mayolothotho|mayolothotho]] || [[word:mayolojojo|mayolojojo]] || [[word:mayoloshosho|mayoloshosho]] || [[word:mayoloko|mayoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mayolothon|mayolothon]] || [[word:mayolojon|mayolojon]] || [[word:mayoloshon|mayoloshon]] || [[word:mayolokon|mayolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mayolothoro|mayolothoro]] || [[word:mayolojoro|mayolojoro]] || [[word:mayoloshoro|mayoloshoro]] || [[word:mayolokoro|mayolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
